title: VOC 시스템 요구사항 (Final)
summary: Final requirements specification for the VOC (Voice of Customer) sub-system covering business/user/admin requirements, tech stack, DB schema, and operational settings.
notes: Hybrid document: primarily PRD (business/user/admin requirements, role definitions, success criteria framing) but contains substantial SPEC content (DB schema, tech stack table, API/auth contracts). Classified as PRD because the document's self-declared framing is '요구사항' (requirements) and section 2 is requirement definition; technical specs are supporting detail. Synthesizer may want to extract SPEC-level constraints (DB schema §4, auth §2.1) separately.
